needs_human_review.message: Xcode version updated from 15.2.0 to 16.4.0 but macOS image updated to macOS-15. Xcode 16.4.0 may not be available on macOS-15 runner, causing build failure.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Verify that Xcode 16.4.0 is pre-installed on the macOS-15 Azure Pipelines image, or align the Xcode version with what is available on that image.

needs_human_review.message: Namespace declaration uses block-scoped syntax instead of file-scoped namespace declaration, violating the 'Use File-Scoped Namespace Declarations' guideline.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Replace the block-scoped namespace with a file-scoped declaration: 'namespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.E2ETests.ServerExecutionTests;' and remove the opening/closing braces.

discarded.message: The installation path for the .NET 8.0 SDK has been changed from a parameterized path (${{ parameters.microBuildOutputFolder }}/.dotnet) to a hardcoded path ($(Agent.TempDirectory)/.dotnet-microbuild). This removes the ability for consumers to control the SDK installation location via the microBuildOutputFolder parameter, which may break builds that rely on the previous path for subsequent steps.
discarded.suggestion: Consider retaining the parameterized path or documenting the breaking change. If the path must be hardcoded, ensure all downstream consumers are updated to reference the new location.

discarded.message: The error condition for servicing builds now additionally requires '$(AspNetCorePatchVersion)' == '1' to trigger BUILD002. This narrows the error check, potentially allowing unused baseline package references to go undetected in servicing builds where AspNetCorePatchVersion is not '1'.
discarded.suggestion: Verify that the new condition correctly captures all intended servicing scenarios. If the intent is to only block changes in the first patch version, ensure the logic is consistent with the release policy.

hunks.section_header: This file should be imported by eng/Versions.props

lines.content: See https://github.com/dotnet/arcade/blob/master/Documentation/Darc.md for instructions on using darc.
<!-- Transitive package to provide coherency in dotnet/extensions -->
<!-- Dependencies required for source build to lift to the previously-source-built version. -->
<!-- PreReleaseBrandingLabel is automatically calculated based on PreReleaseVersionLabel -->
# This script adds internal feeds required to build commits that depend on internal package sources. For instance,
# dotnet6-internal would be added automatically if dotnet6 was found in the nuget.config file. In addition also enables
# dotnet6-internal would be added automatically if dotnet6 was found in the nuget.config file. Similarly,
# dotnet-eng-internal and dotnet-tools-internal are added if dotnet-eng and dotnet-tools are present.
# In addition, this script also enables disabled internal Maestro (darc-int*) feeds.
# Optionally, this script also adds a credential entry for each of the internal feeds if supplied.
# Check for dotnet-eng and add dotnet-eng-internal if present
# Check for dotnet-tools and add dotnet-tools-internal if present
# This script adds internal feeds required to build commits that depend on internal package sources. For instance,
# dotnet6-internal would be added automatically if dotnet6 was found in the nuget.config file. In addition also enables
# dotnet6-internal would be added automatically if dotnet6 was found in the nuget.config file. Similarly,
# dotnet-eng-internal and dotnet-tools-internal are added if dotnet-eng and dotnet-tools are present.
# In addition, this script also enables disabled internal Maestro (darc-int*) feeds.
# Optionally, this script also adds a credential entry for each of the internal feeds if supplied.
# Check for dotnet-eng and add dotnet-eng-internal if present
# Check for dotnet-tools and add dotnet-tools-internal if present
# I want things split line by line
# Unfortunately, _SignType can't be used to exclude the use of the service connection in non-real sign scenarios. The
# variable is not available in template expression. _SignType has a very large proliferation across .NET, so replacing it is tough.
# Location of the MicroBuild output folder
# NOTE: There's something that relies on this being in the "default" source directory for tasks such as Signing to work properly.
# Needed to download the MicroBuild plugin nupkgs on Mac and Linux when nuget.exe is unavailable
# Installing .NET 8 is required to use the MicroBuild signing plugin on non-Windows platforms
displayName: Install .NET 8.0 SDK for MicroBuild Plugin
# Installing the SDK in a '.dotnet-microbuild' directory is required for signing.
# Do not remove '.dotnet-microbuild' from the path without changing the corresponding logic.

Text="Package references changed since the last release. This could be a breaking change and is not allowed in a servicing update. References removed:%0A - @(UnusedBaselinePackageReference, '%0A - ')" />

diff_hunk:.azure/pipelines/jobs/default-.message:
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ jobs:
       # See https://github.com/dotnet/arcade/blob/master/Documentation/ChoosingAMachinePool.md
       pool:
         ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'macOS') }}:
-          vmImage: macOS-13
+          vmImage: macOS-15
         ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'Linux') }}:
           ${{ if eq(parameters.useHostedUbuntu, true) }}:
             vmImage: ubuntu-22.04

@@ -164,7 +164,7 @@ jobs:
           displayName: Disk size
       - ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'macOS') }}:
         - script: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_15.2.0.app/Contents/Developer
-          displayName: Use XCode 15.2.0
+          displayName: Use XCode 16.4.0
       - ${{ if and(eq(parameters.agentOs, 'Windows'), eq(parameters.isAzDOTestingJob, true)) }}:
         - powershell: ./eng/scripts/InstallProcDump.ps1
           displayName: Install ProcDump

@@ -319,7 +319,7 @@ jobs:
       pool:
         ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'macOS') }}:
           name: Azure Pipelines
-          image: macOS-13
+          image: macOS-15
           os: macOS
         ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'Linux') }}:
           name: $(DncEngInternalBuildPool)

@@ -390,7 +390,7 @@ jobs:
           displayName: Disk size
       - ${{ if eq(parameters.agentOs, 'macOS') }}:
         - script: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_15.2.0.app/Contents/Developer
-          displayName: Use XCode 15.2.0
+          displayName: Use XCode 16.4.0
       - ${{ if and(eq(parameters.agentOs, 'Windows'), eq(parameters.isAzDOTestingJob, true)) }}:
         - powershell: ./eng/scripts/InstallProcDump.ps1
           displayName: Install ProcDump

diff_hunk:eng/common/SetupNugetSources.s.message:
@@ -173,6 +174,18 @@ for DotNetVersion in ${DotNetVersions[@]} ; do
     fi
 done
 
+# Check for dotnet-eng and add dotnet-eng-internal if present
+grep -i "<add key=\"dotnet-eng\"" $ConfigFile > /dev/null
+if [ "$?" == "0" ]; then
+    AddOrEnablePackageSource "dotnet-eng-internal" "https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/dnceng/internal/_packaging/dotnet-eng-internal/nuget/$FeedSuffix"
+fi
+
+# Check for dotnet-tools and add dotnet-tools-internal if present
+grep -i "<add key=\"dotnet-tools\"" $ConfigFile > /dev/null
+if [ "$?" == "0" ]; then
+    AddOrEnablePackageSource "dotnet-tools-internal" "https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/dnceng/internal/_packaging/dotnet-tools-internal/nuget/$FeedSuffix"
+fi
+
 # I want things split line by line
 PrevIFS=$IFS
 IFS=$'\n'

needs_human_review.message: Xcode version updated from 15.2.0 to 16.4.0 but macOS image updated to macOS-15. Xcode 16.4.0 may not be available on macOS-15 runner, causing build failure.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Verify that Xcode 16.4.0 is pre-installed on the macOS-15 Azure Pipelines image, or align the Xcode version with what is available on that image.

needs_human_review.message: Xcode version updated from 15.2.0 to 16.4.0 but macOS image updated to macOS-15. Xcode 16.4.0 may not be pre-installed on macOS-15 runner, causing build failure.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Verify that Xcode 16.4.0 is pre-installed on the macOS-15 Azure Pipelines image, or align the Xcode version with what is available on that image.

needs_human_review.message: Namespace declaration uses block-scoped syntax instead of file-scoped namespace declaration, violating the 'Use File-Scoped Namespace Declarations' guideline.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Replace the block-scoped namespace with a file-scoped declaration: 'namespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.E2ETests.ServerExecutionTests;' and remove the opening/closing braces.

discarded.message: The installation path for the .NET 8.0 SDK has been changed from a parameterized path (${{ parameters.microBuildOutputFolder }}/.dotnet) to a hardcoded path ($(Agent.TempDirectory)/.dotnet-microbuild). This removes the ability for consumers to control the SDK installation location via the microBuildOutputFolder parameter, which may break builds that rely on the previous path for subsequent steps.
discarded.suggestion: Consider retaining the parameterized path or documenting the breaking change. If the path must be hardcoded, ensure all downstream consumers are updated to reference the new location.

discarded.message: The error condition for servicing builds now additionally requires '$(AspNetCorePatchVersion)' == '1' to trigger BUILD002. This narrows the error check, potentially allowing unused baseline package references to go undetected in servicing builds where AspNetCorePatchVersion is not '1'.
discarded.suggestion: Verify that the new condition correctly captures all intended servicing scenarios. If the intent is to only block changes in the first patch version, ensure the logic is consistent with the release policy.
